steps.title: Add the equations to eliminate 9(y - 13)
steps.content:
Adding the two equations eliminates the $9(y - 13)$ terms (they have opposite signs):
$$\frac{x}{2} + 9(y - 13) = 27$$
$$\frac{x}{7} - 9(y - 13) = 45$$
Adding yields:
$$\frac{x}{2} + \frac{x}{7} = 72$$

steps.title: Solve for 9x
steps.content:
Combine fractions on the left with common denominator 14:
$$\frac{7x + 2x}{14} = 72$$
$$\frac{9x}{14} = 72$$
Multiply both sides by 14:
$$9x = 1008$$
